goals.description: Send a frantic, stream-of-consciousness voice note to cohort_3 complaining about the assignment being 'too hard' and demanding they distract me immediately.
goals.rationale: My value for relationships (0.5) is my only shield against anxiety. The thought of explaining the late submission to the professor feels like an interpersonal conflict I cannot handle right now. My impulsive nature means I can't wait to feel 'supported' before acting; I need immediate validation from my close friends to numb the guilt.

goals.rationale: I have low sleep discipline and high stress. My short planning horizon means I need immediate sensory comfort (food) to soothe myself without facing any real-world consequences. Eating while chatting is the easiest way to maintain this 'waiting mode' and avoid closing the laptop.
